display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Help! We Bought A Village
programme.desc: Intrepid Brits restore empty and unloved settlements heading steadily for collapse, as they breathe new life into remote villages, hamlets, borgos and cortijos abroad.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Celebrity Tipping Point NZ
programme.desc: Will they hit rough seas, or could it be a barrel of laughs? Olympian boardsailor Barbara Kendall and comedians Ben Hurley and Courtney Dawson compete for the chance to win $10,000 for their charities

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Season Finale: TV presenter Alex Brooker and comedian Ellie Taylor are thrown together for a hair-raising adventure across Java, where the volcanoes pose as big a threat as the terrifying roads.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon is back in the host's chair, with Lee Mack and David Mitchell returning as team captains. Guests Nabil Abdulrashid, Lucy Beaumont, Gethin Jones, and Francesca Mills sort fact from fiction.

programme.title: Hard Quiz
programme.desc: Four know-it-alls want Tom Gleeson’s Big Brass Mug: an Android smartphone aficionado, a Sydney Opera House tour guide, an AFL umpire, and someone who is into people getting hit with padded poles.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Viliami steps up.

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: There's a huge and very messy back cyst for Dr Adil Sheraz to deal with. S5 E5

programme.title: Endangered Species Aotearoa
programme.desc: Nicola and Pax’s search for endangered species sees them venturing into the Kaikōura region. Home to an array of seabirds, and marine wildlife.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Help! We Bought A Village
programme.desc: Intrepid Brits restore empty and unloved settlements heading steadily for collapse, as they breathe new life into remote villages, hamlets, borgos and cortijos abroad.

programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: It's a wet and wild night for Delta Team Jordan and Manaia. Pippa finds a Biosecurity hazard stinking out the mail centre. DOC is searching for stoats in every nook and cranny on Waiheke Island. S15E5

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: A motorbike rider is forced off the road and abandoned, injured, on the verge. Tourists T-bone at Deadman’s Point. A forbidden driver is caught 30 minutes later, back in the hot seat. S10 E5

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: As the team continues tracing Senior's money trail, they arrange a delicate meeting with a key accomplice, one that could expose them all. S2 E14

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Poppy considers Tyler.

programme.title: Down For Love
programme.desc: Hayley gets swept off her feet, Chloe and Nathan meet the families and Carlos makes a comeback. S2 E5

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Rookie architect Nick, is aiming to solve Australia's housing crisis by showing that good design is affordable for everyone.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson is joined by his uncle Matheson to test a night in a local youth hostel, sign up for a cookery class, take a guided walk on Hadrian's Wall and visit remote honey beehives.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson joins forces with his brother David and uncle Matheson for landscape painting, an organised treetop adventure park and fly fishing on a picturesque Northumbrian lake.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An impressive compound commandeered and repurposed by a brutal regime and an eerie complex off the coast of Ireland that became the biggest of its kind.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Legendary film sets with surprising pasts and real locations that inspired Hollywood. Within these decaying structures are the echoes of history.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Jack head to Staffordshire to pick up five vehicles from collector Rob's colossal barn, including a Mini and a Morris Minor.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's in Lincolnshire picking up a 1935 Riley Falcon - a good-looking saloon car, with a pre-select gearbox.

programme.title: Battle Honours
programme.desc: The story of the US 101st Airborne, the Screaming Eagles, who parachuted into their first battle on D-Day, 6th June 1944 and swiftly proved their worth.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: The first day of the Somme Offensive was the blackest day in the British Army's history. The shocking numbers are revealed as the war retrospective revisits 1916.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team head to the All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club in Wimbledon, where items of interest include a valuable brooch and one of John McEnroe's racquets.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team appraise more items in Wimbledon, including memorabilia from the 1908 London Olympics and a pencil-drawing of Admiral Lord Nelson.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to County Durham where Neil Walker is reluctantly letting his late dad's car collection go, including a Japanese take on a classic British Jag; the Mitsuoka Viewt.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave collects a Ford Fiesta XR2i that's not moved from a garage for twenty-one years and Derek picks up a 1956 Siva Tourer, made famous in Doctor Who.

programme.title: Battle Honours
programme.desc: The story of the US 101st Airborne, the Screaming Eagles, who parachuted into their first battle on D-Day, 6th June 1944 and swiftly proved their worth.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: The first day of the Somme Offensive was the blackest day in the British Army's history. The shocking numbers are revealed as the war retrospective revisits 1916.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team head to the All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club in Wimbledon, where items of interest include a valuable brooch and one of John McEnroe's racquets.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: The work of scientists studying the effects of climate change around the world to discover its impact for all life on Earth.

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: The death of Edward the Confessor triggers a bitter race to succeed him as king of England, with Earl Harold taking the crown. However, William of Normandy believes the throne is his.

programme.title: Fake Or Fortune?
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and Philip Mould investigate investigate a dreamlike landscape painting purported to be by one of the forefathers of Impressionism, Jean-Baptiste-Camille Corot.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to County Durham where Neil Walker is reluctantly letting his late dad's car collection go, including a Japanese take on a classic British Jag; the Mitsuoka Viewt.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave collects a Ford Fiesta XR2i that's not moved from a garage for twenty-one years and Derek picks up a 1956 Siva Tourer, made famous in Doctor Who.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Jack head to Staffordshire to pick up five vehicles from collector Rob's colossal barn, including a Mini and a Morris Minor.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry and Simon head to Shropshire to help Marvin and Karen with some shed decluttering. Henry lightly restores an old Ford truck and Simon eyes a '70s TV for a potential fish tank.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson and podcaster Rosie Ramsey sign up for a bushcraft lesson and test the health benefits of laughter during an adrenaline-fuelled power buggy race.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Actress Charlie Hardwick shows Robson the hidden gems of the east Durham coastline while taking an art class on the sand and attending an outdoor singing session.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: In North Wales a secret facility which once manufactured mustard gas and enriched uranium lies in ruins; In Malta is a luxurious quarantine facility, that hides a dark secret.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Ruins of a vast industrial ghost town in the United States, a windswept, Scottish island and the remains of a resort in Japan that watched a city burn.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek brings a small army of military hardware to Thornton le Dale including a Studebaker Weasel tracked vehicle and a WWII-era Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul collects a cherished 1924 Rover 9 that's been in the same family since the 1950s and only had one previous owner before that.

programme.title: Battle Honours
programme.desc: A focus on the US Army Rangers, America's first true Special Forces units, who were specially selected and trained with the help of British commandos.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Great War, with statistics helping to shed new light on the horrendous conflict. Hear about the effect of World War I on the domestic front.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Manchester Town Hall, where items of interest include a picture by artist LS Lowry and a plate with a five-figure valuation.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit Seaton Delaval Hall in Northumberland, where items up for valuation include a collection of toys made by prisoners of war.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave meets the inspirational owner of a Reliant Robin who's selling it to raise money for charity.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A sun-bleached red Vauxhall Astra GTE gives the team a headache as they also buy a classic French moped and catch up on the restoration of a barn find Mini Cooper S.

programme.title: Battle Honours
programme.desc: A focus on the US Army Rangers, America's first true Special Forces units, who were specially selected and trained with the help of British commandos.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Great War, with statistics helping to shed new light on the horrendous conflict. Hear about the effect of World War I on the domestic front.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Manchester Town Hall, where items of interest include a picture by artist LS Lowry and a plate with a five-figure valuation.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough showcases wildlife in coastal regions, from Cape fur seals on n South Africa's Robberg Peninsula to hungry lions on Namibia's infamous Skeleton Coast.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul, Mick and Charlie are in Hull for one of their biggest ever collections. Dave takes a test drive in Tesla Model X and Derek is bowled over by a classic vintage mo.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewson family business starts a new era as Charlie heads off on his first solo collection, to pick up an Austin van from the North York Moors.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave meets the inspirational owner of a Reliant Robin who's selling it to raise money for charity.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A sun-bleached red Vauxhall Astra GTE gives the team a headache as they also buy a classic French moped and catch up on the restoration of a barn find Mini Cooper S.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: The high-stakes quiz tasks teams with navigating a bridge of truths while avoiding lies to win cash prizes for charity.

programme.title: Good Chef, Bad Chef
programme.desc: Mike, Jacq, Tim and Jo create stunning dishes, balancing bold flavours and wholesome ingredients. Every meal is a delight-what will you try first?

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Our Travel Guides are about to embark on a Finnish adventure - a winter wonderland like no other! From the quirky cities to the rugged north, it's one heck of an Arctic ride. S6 E7

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa and Marge engage in a spirited debate at the nail salon. S20 E20

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard jumps through hoops to help secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy. Also, Howard and Bernadette have a hard time deciding who should stay at home with the kids. S11 E17

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John feels the pressure. Abigail gets an ultimatum. Beau turns on the charm.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Viliami steps up.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: In the second episode of Perfect Pairings week, the home cooks must today select one of five classic flavour pairings to hero as they go head-to-head in an elimination cook off.

programme.title: Destination X UK
programme.desc: With just four passengers left on board, the X-bus travels further into Europe and one step closer to that £100,000 prize.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: The team races to find Nancy Albright, a person with a drug addiction searching for a new type of high. S2 E12

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The five comics devise ways to help Alex Horne make Greg Davies’s breakfast. Plus, a former champion makes a dramatic return. Starring New Zealand's very own Rose Matafeo! S9 E5

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead and her hair is done up '70s style complete with vintage clothes, the CSI team discovers clues that point to a killer with a hair fetish. S12 E13

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A couple's desire for new thrills take them to deadly heights - twice.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Joe considers exposing his father's secret while Tom and Ellen investigate a mysterious lead. Meanwhile, Patty navigates a difficult divorce as personal and financial stakes rise. S3 E2

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Tensions arise among the employees after an attempted robbery, pitting Dina against Jonah. Meanwhile, Glenn has a tough time firing the store security guard. S3 E4

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back for Season 4 with more laughter and learning. Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Riki, and Buzz as they explore the world around them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The superheroes Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy love saving the world. But after they decide to stop fighting crime, things do not go as planned.

programme.title: Darwin & Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother/sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: In the second episode of Perfect Pairings week, the home cooks must today select one of five classic flavour pairings to hero as they go head-to-head in an elimination cook off.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Viliami steps up.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John feels the pressure. Abigail gets an ultimatum. Beau turns on the charm.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: The high-stakes quiz tasks teams with navigating a bridge of truths while avoiding lies to win cash prizes for charity.

programme.title: Good Chef, Bad Chef
programme.desc: Mike, Jacq, Tim and Jo create stunning dishes, balancing bold flavours and wholesome ingredients. Every meal is a delight-what will you try first?

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Our Guides are heading to Melbourne for a week long vacation in Victoria's capital of cool before a quick pitstop on Phillip Island. S6 E8

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer forms a border patrol group when unemployed workers from Ogdenville come to Springfield. S20 E21

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Leonard learns that Sheldon is the president of the Tenants Association, he decides to run against him. S11 E19

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Sonny’s problems snowball. Abigail’s grudge backfires. Beau flexes his grip on Sonny.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Poppy considers Tyler.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: As perfect pairs week continues, contestants must work in perfect pairs to create four serves of a dessert inspired by the iconic Reese's Peanut Butter Cup.

programme.title: Destination X UK
programme.desc: Season Finale: It's the grand final and the last chance for one player to get their hands on £100,000. A nail-biting sprint sees a race around one of Europe’s most iconic cities.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Potential love interests are introduced by gradually revealing their naked bodies... Then the contestants must choose a partner based on their first impressions.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Jo Brand demonstrates an impressive grasp of street slang and Katy Wix uses a long part of her body to steal something. Starring New Zealand's very own Rose Matafeo! S9 E6

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Russell asks for advice from a former colleague on a case involving the death of a man's ex-girlfriend. S12 E14

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A couple kills a co-worker and plot to kill some of her former lovers.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Joe Tobin and his lawyer try to hide a witness. Patty seeks leverage with the DA's investigation as Tom tells his in-laws that their investments in the Tobin Ponzi scheme have bankrupted them. S3 E3

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: As Mateo turns to stranger and stranger home remedies for an ear infection, Amy and Jonah decide to offer an alternative to Cloud 9's terrible health insurance plan. S3 E6

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back for Season 4 with more laughter and learning. Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Riki, and Buzz as they explore the world around them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The superheroes Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy love saving the world. But after they decide to stop fighting crime, things do not go as planned.

programme.title: Lu And The Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Navigating preschool life can be tricky! Lu the affectionate ladybird is used to getting her own way - but now, alongside her new classmates, she must learn what it means to be a good friend.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: As perfect pairs week continues, contestants must work in perfect pairs to create four serves of a dessert inspired by the iconic Reese's Peanut Butter Cup.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Poppy considers Tyler.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough looks at nature's most amazing animals. In this episode it is the giant squid and owls.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on nature's most extraordinary creatures. Looking at cuckoos and the way the death's-head hawkmoth steals honey.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough explores the most intriguing animals. Here he looks at vampire bats and gorillas.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on an array of animals that baffle and fascinate. We learn about how naturalists found out some eels were electric.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shares secrets of the natural world. Here he looks at the wood frog and the emperor penguin.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: The evergreen Sir David Attenborough weaves another tale of wonder as he salutes nature's most intricate structures, from spiders' webs to birds' nests.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on nature's most amazing animals. Sir David looks at female hyaenas and explains why male seahorses give birth.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough looks at nature's most amazing animals. In this episode it is the giant squid and owls.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on nature's most extraordinary creatures. Looking at cuckoos and the way the death's-head hawkmoth steals honey.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough explores the most intriguing animals. Here he looks at vampire bats and gorillas.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on an array of animals that baffle and fascinate. We learn about how naturalists found out some eels were electric.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the brand new Elizabeth Line and have access to two of its stations weeks before the line opens.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim and Siddy visit Quainton Road in Buckinghamshire, 50 miles from London - and once on the underground. Siddy also explores Kingsway tramway tunnel.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway visit the cathedral-like Greenwich Power Station, which stands ready to power the tube at short notice.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the tube station with the most platforms, Baker Street.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the brand new Elizabeth Line and have access to two of its stations weeks before the line opens.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim and Siddy visit Quainton Road in Buckinghamshire, 50 miles from London - and once on the underground. Siddy also explores Kingsway tramway tunnel.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway visit the cathedral-like Greenwich Power Station, which stands ready to power the tube at short notice.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the tube station with the most platforms, Baker Street.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson visits the Yorkshire coastal village of Flamborough and discovers its historic chalk buildings.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie, Ken, Tucker and Speed find an abandoned tank, so Wolfie decides they should drive it to the Houses of Parliament.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie and Ken return to Tooting after their stint in prison, to find that much has changed in their absence - and not for the better.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front discovers the South African rugby team's tour plans and Wolfie decides to air his anti-fascist protest at their upcoming match.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: For once, Wolfie's not the one on trial as he finds himself face-to-face with hardened criminal Ronnie Lynch in court.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie, Ken, Tucker and Speed find an abandoned tank, so Wolfie decides they should drive it to the Houses of Parliament.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front are stuck in prison after stealing a tank, until impresario Benny Salzberg arrives with a plan.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie and Ken return to Tooting after their stint in prison, to find that much has changed in their absence - and not for the better.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front discovers the South African rugby team's tour plans and Wolfie decides to air his anti-fascist protest at their upcoming match.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Today, crews struggle to reach a woman who has fallen from her horse on treacherous boggy ground. Paramedics also treat a 14-year-old boy in agony with suspected appendicitis.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Paramedics attend a father and son whose car has been hit by a falling tree on a dark and stormy night, and are called out to assist a homeless woman sheltering in a bin shed.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Paramedics from the South Central Ambulance Service treat a site foreman having a heart attack on a building site and a woman who has hit her head on sharp gardening shears.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Paramedics in Oxford race to an 8-month-old baby who needs urgent help to breathe. In Portsmouth, a cancer patient thinks her chemotherapy drugs are causing her chest pain.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Today, crews struggle to reach a woman who has fallen from her horse on treacherous boggy ground. Paramedics also treat a 14-year-old boy in agony with suspected appendicitis.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Paramedics attend a father and son whose car has been hit by a falling tree on a dark and stormy night, and are called out to assist a homeless woman sheltering in a bin shed.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Paramedics from the South Central Ambulance Service treat a site foreman having a heart attack on a building site and a woman who has hit her head on sharp gardening shears.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Paramedics in Oxford race to an 8-month-old baby who needs urgent help to breathe. In Portsmouth, a cancer patient thinks her chemotherapy drugs are causing her chest pain.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A historic Frazer Nash car must be fixed before a big race. Plus, the first car ever to go round the track is resurrected but will the museum director be able to drive it.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A Delage V12 famous for early women's records on the track returns to be driven by a modern-day legend. Plus, Concord's wings need some urgent TLC.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A rare Triumph motorcycle is rescued from a barn and resurrected. There's a battle against the elements for vintage aircraft to grace Brookland's skies once again.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: An F1 racer goes on a perilous journey and there's a new addition to the exhibit - a Formula E car.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: The Napier Railton - the legendary racing car and jewel in the museum's motoring crown - is put through its paces when it meets an old rival.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A historic Frazer Nash car must be fixed before a big race. Plus, the first car ever to go round the track is resurrected but will the museum director be able to drive it.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Brother Can You Spare a Crime: Murdoch suspects that someone in a vagrant encampment robbed and killed a young woman.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates after a murder is transmitted over James Pendrick's new invention.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Margaret and Todd work on two seemingly unrelated cases, only to discover a key piece of information from Todd's boring civil case could help Margaret's high-profile client.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. When Murdoch probes deaths linked to Egyptian antiquities, Crabtree is convinced a curse is to blame.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The smash hit mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. While investigating an explosion, Murdoch infiltrates an anarchist group lead by Emma Goldman.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank Hathaway finds an unlikely partner in Luella Shakespeare when they are thrown together to catch a killer.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Female impersonators come under suspicion when a man is found burnt to death on a cabaret bar's doorstep, and the team discovers the victim was being bullied.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a famous starlet is killed onstage during a preview performance, Rex takes on a starring role while Charlie goes behind the scenes to find the killer.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: The search for a pair of drug couriers uncovers an assassination plot and a surprising secret that Carrie thought she had put behind her.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: An archaeologist is poisoned during a dig, with no evidence to prove how it was done. Meanwhile, Neville tests his skills in an island crab-cooking competition.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. When Murdoch probes deaths linked to Egyptian antiquities, Crabtree is convinced a curse is to blame.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The smash hit mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. While investigating an explosion, Murdoch infiltrates an anarchist group lead by Emma Goldman.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Female impersonators come under suspicion when a man is found burnt to death on a cabaret bar's doorstep, and the team discovers the victim was being bullied.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a famous starlet is killed onstage during a preview performance, Rex takes on a starring role while Charlie goes behind the scenes to find the killer.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank Hathaway finds an unlikely partner in Luella Shakespeare when they are thrown together to catch a killer.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Hockey scout Matt Shade joins forces with private investigator Angie Everett to look into the case of his client, a young player who falls ill under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: An archaeologist is poisoned during a dig, with no evidence to prove how it was done. Meanwhile, Neville tests his skills in an island crab-cooking competition.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team joins Naomi in Saint Barnabas when her best friend's father is murdered at a wedding. Marlon tries to prepare for his exams but is easily distracted.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Rock 'n' roll reaches Kembleford when a group of bikers causes outrage and excitement in equal measure.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Hockey scout Matt Shade joins forces with private investigator Angie Everett to look into the case of his client, a young player who falls ill under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric of the Cotswolds. Brown becomes embroiled in an art heist masterminded by his adversary Flambeau.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: An archaeologist is poisoned during a dig, with no evidence to prove how it was done. Meanwhile, Neville tests his skills in an island crab-cooking competition.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. When Murdoch probes deaths linked to Egyptian antiquities, Crabtree is convinced a curse is to blame.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: When Todd reunites with a childhood friend with a chequered past, he convinces Margaret to represent him in a minor legal case.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as Canada's answer to Sherlock in the series set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch investigates the death of a young singer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the crime drama set in 19th century Toronto. Is the ambitious inventor of an electric vehicle also a killer.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank Hathaway and Luella Shakespeare investigate the death of a care home worker, sending Sebastian undercover as a care assistant.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: So Long and Thanks for All the Red Snapper: Teresa reconnects with her ex-fiance while investigating a surfer's murder. Cho questions whether he should be in a relationship with Summer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When his sister contacts him for help, Jesse heads to Northern Ontario with Sarah and Rex, where a detective is trying to unravel the secret Jesse's sister is keeping.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie and Al are drafted to transport an embezzlement trial's star witness to Florida.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A lottery winner is found dead at her villa, much to the horror of her husband and their visiting friends. But the mystery deepens when the victim's body vanishes..

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as Canada's answer to Sherlock in the series set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch investigates the death of a young singer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the crime drama set in 19th century Toronto. Is the ambitious inventor of an electric vehicle also a killer.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: So Long and Thanks for All the Red Snapper: Teresa reconnects with her ex-fiance while investigating a surfer's murder. Cho questions whether he should be in a relationship with Summer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When his sister contacts him for help, Jesse heads to Northern Ontario with Sarah and Rex, where a detective is trying to unravel the secret Jesse's sister is keeping.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank Hathaway and Luella Shakespeare investigate the death of a care home worker, sending Sebastian undercover as a care assistant.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Shade and Angie are given a taste of just how volatile professional partnerships can get as they investigate a high-profile murder within Toronto's restaurant scene.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A lottery winner is found dead at her villa, much to the horror of her husband and their visiting friends. But the mystery deepens when the victim's body vanishes..

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: When a warden is murdered in broad daylight, Sabrina and Zak find themselves navigating the world of the unhoused and on the trail of a possible spree killer.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: The team races to catch Mark Marsden, also known as the Widower, a charming serial killer who murdered three of his wives in cold blood - and has decided to marry again.
